subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Celtic at sea, 1912-12-10
subcodes.first_line: This is little compared to America.  Though expenses are lower in England, still their workers' wages are too low
subcodes.first_line_orig: کم است نسبت بامریکا هر چند مصارف انگلند کمتر است ولی باز اُجرت مزدوران
